heading: Action by the Comptroller General
label: 754 Action by the Comptroller General
text: When the Comptroller General has authority, the Comptroller General promptly shall carry out action the General Accounting Office Personnel Appeals Board orders under .1section 753 of this titleSee Change of Name note below.1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)75431:52–3(i)., , .Feb. 15, 1980Pub. L. 96–191, § 4(i)94 Stat. 31The words “to do so” and “corrective” are omitted as surplus. The words “under ” are added for clarity.section 753 of this title
Change of NameGeneral Accounting Office redesignated Government Accountability Office. See , set out as a note under .section 8 of Pub. L. 108–271section 702 of this title
